series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of records compiled and retained to provide the Commission on Accreditation for Law Enforcement Agencies (CALEA) with a comprehensive view of division operations and personnel performance and to demonstrate compliance with law enforcement agency standards established by CALEA for the purpose of earning accreditation, which is a commitment to excellence award. For a complete list of CALEA accreditation standards, for which compliance must be documented, see http://www.calea.org/sites/default/files/Apx%20H-law%20enforcement.pdf

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current and immediately preceding accreditation cycles, plus one year. ; Electronic: Current and immediately preceding accreditation cycles, plus one year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
